title: Maximum Frequency Stack
input_format: A sequence of push and pop operations.
output_format: For pop operations, return the most frequent element (ties broken by most recent).
constraints:
- `0 <= val <= 10^9`
- At most `2 * 10^4` calls to push and pop.
- It is guaranteed there will be at least one element in the stack before calling pop.
function_signature: class FreqStack { constructor() {} push(val: number): void {} pop(): number {} }
